content.en:
It's been some time again, and the auction of the Garanbao ship is about to begin.

A number of peak realm gods entered the auction one after another, but those who came in were all peak realm gods of the 7,362 realm, and the peak realm gods of other realms would not come in.

After all, this is an auction with a ship quota or a staff quota, and they have already purchased it, so naturally they don't need to bid again.

Soon, all the pinnacle realm gods of the Seven Thousand Three Hundred and Sixty-two Territory were sitting here.

Ye Tian sat with some of the peak realm gods of the human race, and these peak realm gods of the human race naturally would not come to buy the places on the ship, and they couldn't afford to buy them, so they purely came to increase their knowledge.

Then.

A pinnacle realm god from the Garlan treasure ship came up as an auctioneer, and this pinnacle realm god was not the same as the pinnacle realm god last time, but no pinnacle realm god would care about this.

After the auctioneer had made some opening remarks, he announced the start of the auction.

"Next, the first place to follow the ship will be auctioned, and the starting price will be ~ 100,000 gala blue treasure coins!"

The auctioneer said.

The starting price did not go up, it was still the same as the last time, but the final price was definitely more than that.

The point is, they don't know how many places there are, and the Glambo ship did not announce the number of places to be traded this time.

Moreover, the pinnacle realm gods of other realms do not disclose the number of followers, but it can be roughly guessed that the number of followers should be no less than a hundred.

Therefore, the first place to follow the boat should not be too hard to bid, but it is definitely higher than before.

Because anyone who wants to buy a place with the ship will definitely go bankrupt.

Therefore, it is also willing to pay some more Galanbao coins.

Really.

A pinnacle realm god bids wildly.

"120,000 Galanbao coins!"

"160,000 Galanbao Coins!"

"Two hundred thousand garina coins!"

After these peak realm gods have collected the abyss of the demon seed, collected some resources of the supreme forces that have been destroyed, and allocated some resources of the ice ghost organization, all of them are not low.

Gradually, the auction price has soared to 300,000 Galanbao coins.

In the end, a pinnacle realm god bid for this place at the price of 390,000 garanbao coins.

This price is much higher than last time.

After that, the amount of each ship was around 30,000 and 70,000 Galanbao coins.

Suddenly.

The bidding of a peak realm god made Ye Tian a little surprised.

"It's the god of the Liangyi Realm, this guy is leaving too!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

This is one of the six supreme gods among the supreme forces, and now he should be regarded as one of the seven supreme gods, because his strength is even more powerful.

Such a pinnacle realm god was at the top of the Seven Thousand Three Hundred and Sixty-two Territory in the past, and he didn't need to take risks, but he could continuously obtain extradimensional resources, and any benefits were indispensable to him.

But now, he wants to leave.

"It is estimated that after the gods of the Liangyi Realm have purchased the quota for the ship, they will pay a huge price to let the Garanbao ship send him to a more powerful territory before he disembarks. Ye Tian guessed.

However, it has nothing to do with him.

Soon, the gods of the Liangyi Realm purchased a place to follow the ship.

Afterwards.

Five of the other six Supreme Realm Gods have also purchased places to follow the ship, obviously also wanting to leave, and will not stay in this territory.

Obviously, none of them can persist in the hundreds of extradimensional epochs for so long, and they are also deeply affected by the assimilation of super-dimensional, as long as they leave, they will have the opportunity to hold on for a longer time, and only then will they have the slightest hope of comprehending the power of super-dimensional and advancing to the half-step super-dimensional realm.

Of course, it is more likely that they fell and died on the way to the adventure, but they had no other choice.

If they had known, they would have bid a little later, and they could save some Garanbao coins, but no matter how low the transaction price is, it will not be less than 300,000 Galanbol coins.

Gradually, the 100 places on board were sold out.

At this time, the auctioneer of the Garanbao ship saw that the transaction price was about to be less than 300,000 Galanbol coins, so he no longer gave the ship a quota.

"Ladies and gentlemen, that's all for the following quota of the Garanbao ship, and then sell the staff quota. The number of employees can be announced in advance, and a total of 10 employee places will be sold, with a starting price of 300,000 Galanbao coins. "

Subsequently, the auction began. []

However, there are not many peak realm gods bidding for employee slots, and those who are still bidding.

In the end, a pinnacle realm god bid for an employee spot at a price of 1.12 million.

The other nine employee places are not less than 1 million transaction prices.

It can be said that these places have almost exhausted the wealth of these peak realm gods.

Of course, there are also some peak realm gods who are very deeply hidden, maybe there is still a lot of wealth, but there are still some points to be done in the future, and there are many places to spend Jialanbao coins.

As the ten staff spots were auctioned, the auctioneer of the Garanbao Ship announced: "This pinnacle realm god, this auction is over, and the pinnacle realm god who does not have a quota with the ship and the staff quota please leave and must not stay here." In addition, the next arrival of the Garanbo ship will be after the 100th extradimensional era. "

After speaking, many peak realm gods left one after another.

......

Beyond the Garanbo ship.

Ye Tian and a group of peak realm gods came out, but there were more than a hundred peak realm gods missing, and they were also the most powerful group of peak realm gods.

It can be said that the strength of today's major supreme forces has plummeted, and only some weak peak realm gods remain.

Only the Terrans are still so powerful.

At this time.

Many peak realm gods were very puzzled, they all knew very well that Ye Tian was extremely powerful and had a lot of wealth, why was it not enough to buy a place with the ship.

In fact, Ye Tian also considered whether to buy a place to follow the ship and leave this territory.

But he thought about it carefully and forgot it.

First of all, the number of companions on the Garanbol ship will only lead him to weaker realms, and in order to enter stronger territories, he will need to pay more Garanbol coins.

The point is, even if he enters those powerful realms, it will be very difficult for him to become a half-step extradimensional realm.

So.

He wanted to find a way to leave the territory of 7362 after comprehending the power of the extradimensionality.

For example, the extra-dimensional formation of the Ice Ghost Organization can leave, and the Ice Ghost Organization will inevitably come to retaliate, and he can leave at that time.

"With resources such as the Strange Blood Pupil, I have a good chance of comprehending the power of the extradimensional dimension, so I don't have to worry about not being able to leave!"

In fact, there is another problem, that is, he has too many secrets, and this time he has bought too many good things, and he is worried that the Garanbao ship will spy on him.

Therefore, he was the first to leave.

Fortunately, the Galanbo ship was doing business and did not send the Peak Realm God to follow it.

But if he leaves with the Garanbol, there is no guarantee that the Garambol will not pay attention to him.
